eka-element.t: [化] 待寻元素; 准元素(历史上对周期表中尚缺的元素的叫法)

ekaterinburg.t: 叶卡特琳堡(前苏联乌拉尔地区城市斯维尔德洛夫斯克)

ekco.t: abbr. EK Cole (Limited) <英国>埃里克·科克汉姆·柯尔有限公司

ekd.t: abbr. Elkedra; Northern Territory; Australia 澳大利亚; Evangelische Kirche in Deutschland (German=Protestant Church in Germany) （德语）德国新教教堂

eke.d:
v. t. To increase; to add to; to augment; -- now commonly used
   with out, the notion conveyed being to add to, or piece out by a
   laborious, inferior, or scanty addition; as, to eke out a scanty supply
   of one kind with some other.
adv. In addition; also; likewise.
n. An addition.

eke out.t: 弥补...的不足, 竭力维持

eked.t: v. （靠节省用量）使…的供应持久( eke的过去式和过去分词 ); 节约使用; 竭力维持生计; 勉强度日

ekehorn's operation.t: [医] 埃科霍恩氏手术(一种直肠固定术)

eken.t: abbr. (Swedish slang=Stockholm) （瑞典俚语）股票，库存

ekes.t: v. （靠节省用量）使…的供应持久( eke的第三人称单数 ); 节约使用; 竭力维持生计; 勉强度日

ekg.d: n a graphical recording of the cardiac cycle produced by an electrocardiograph

eking.t: v. 增加；延长（eke的ing 形式）
eking.d:
p. pr. & vb. n. of Eke
v. t. A lengthening or filling piece to make good a deficiency
   in length.
v. t. The carved work under the quarter piece at the aft part
   of the quarter gallery.

ekistics.t: n. 城高及区域的规划学

ekklesia.t: n. 响应侍奉上帝的人; 古希腊城邦(尤指雅典)的市民议会

ekman.d: n Swedish oceanographer who recognized the role of the Coriolis effect on ocean currents (1874-1954)

eko.t: n. (Eko)人名；(喀、瑞典)埃科；(日)江湖 (姓)

ekos.t: (eko 的复数) n. (Eko)人名；(喀、瑞典)埃科；(日)江湖 (姓)

ekphrastic.t: [网络] 画诗；和意可夫拉西斯

ektachrome.t: [医]埃克塔克罗姆[彩色反转片]

ektebin.t: [医] 埃克提宾(一种治疗结核病的软膏)

eku.t: abbr. earliest known usage 最早的被人熟知的用法

ekuele.t: [单复同]n.埃奎勒(赤道几内亚货币单位)

eky.t: [医] 电记波照片, 心电记波图
